title: Sony ends physical discs and the industry reacts with criticism and debates about the digital future
summary: Analysts, developers, and media analyze the implications of PlayStation's decision to abandon the physical format, while players protest and Nintendo could inherit the leadership in physical games.

title: Rumors of studio closures and restructuring shake Xbox
summary: Obsidian Entertainment and other Microsoft teams negotiate to avoid closure amid conflicting reports about a possible 'reset' of the Xbox division.

title: Leaks indicate that Final Fantasy VII Revelation will have story expansions and DLC
summary: The store page and leaked lists reveal that Cloud's story could continue beyond the end of the trilogy.

title: The first Steam Machines receive mixed reviews, including from former PlayStation president Shuhei Yoshida
summary: The arrival of Steam Machines generates divided opinions, with Yoshida unfavorably comparing them to the PS4 era.

title: Ontos, the successor to Soma, delayed until 2027 to fulfill the studio's ambitious vision
summary: Frictional Games postpones its next horror title to ensure the quality of its most ambitious project.

title: Capcom advances the release date of Onimusha: Way of the Sword
summary: The studio decides to move the release to avoid the congestion of premieres in September 2026.

title: Company of Heroes 3: Final Stand announced, a wave defense game
summary: The new entry in the strategy franchise is presented as a roguelite defense title.

title: Multiple games announced for Nintendo Switch 2
summary: Various titles like Sky the Scraper, Orbitals, Splatoon Raiders, and remasters of Remothered and Warhammer 40K will arrive on the new console.

title: OtherSide Entertainment suffers new layoffs and is left with fewer than 10 employees
summary: The studio of Thick as Thieves is drastically reduced after a new round of layoffs.

title: Suicide Squad developers speak about the game's difficulties
summary: Team leaders confess that they felt they no longer created games, but rather followed a spreadsheet.

title: Dune: Awakening announces physical edition for PS5 with a disc inside
summary: The desert survival MMO confirms its physical format release for consoles.

title: Diablo 4 Season 14 brings back the difficulty players were missing
summary: The new season is praised for returning the challenge, although some critics point out that it ignores what made the game great.

title: Amazon Prime gives away a dozen games in July for its subscribers
summary: Prime members can claim several free titles during the month of July.

title: Kojima's horror game OD survives Microsoft cuts for the second time
summary: The Xbox exclusive project for Kojima Productions is unaffected by the massive cancellations.

title: Japan honors George Lucas with the animated short The Ninth Jedi
summary: The new trailer of the Star Wars project expands the universe beyond the Skywalker saga.

title: Captain America's 'bulge' in Marvel Rivals causes a sensation on the Internet
summary: The character's summer skin includes a bouncing effect that does not go unnoticed.

title: Flask, an alchemy autobattler with demo available on Steam
summary: The game combines automatic battles with creature creation in a dark hand-drawn world.

title: The shooter game Cinder City reduces its RAM requirements after initial controversy
summary: After demanding 64 GB of memory, the studio halves the requirements in response to criticism.

title: Star Fox leads sales in Japan during its first week
summary: Famitsu data shows a solid debut for the new title in the franchise.

title: Rockstar UK employees denounce pay gap and crunch in GTA 6 development
summary: Workers claim that vague bonuses and long working hours persist at the studio.
